CalendarPlan.title: CalendarPlan
CalendarPlan.description: User's generated 90-day AI monetization calendar plan and its completion tracked state.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns this plan.

output.description: The huge markdown output generated by the AI.

completedDays.description: A map of day number to a boolean representing if it's completed.

UserAccount.title: UserAccount
UserAccount.description: Stored user profile and role information.

role.description: Role of the user, can be 'admin' or 'user'.

SystemConfig.title: SystemConfig
SystemConfig.description: Global system configuration, e.g. whether admin is claimed.

adminClaimed.description: Whether the admin role has been given out

users/{userId}.description: Stores user profile and access tier.

system/config.description: System flags like first user configuration.
